name: create_payment_link
description: Generate a shareable payment link in Razorpay that you can send to customers via email, SMS, or messaging apps. The customer clicks the link, sees a hosted payment page, and pays using any supported method. No integration required on the customer side.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The payment amount in smallest currency unit (paise for INR). Use 0 for customer-entered amounts.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description for the payment link, shown to the customer.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: Customer details. Object with 'name', 'email', and/or 'contact' (phone number).

parameters.name: notify
parameters.description: Notification channels. Object with 'sms' and/or 'email' booleans.

parameters.name: callback_url
parameters.description: URL to redirect the customer after payment completion.

parameters.name: callback_method
parameters.description: HTTP method for the callback redirect. Default 'get'.

parameters.name: expire_by
parameters.description: Unix timestamp after which the link expires.
